watchdog_orgs_searched: Democracy for the Arab World Now (DAWN)
adversarial_framing_finding: Lead Regional story (Houthi maritime embargo on Saudi Arabia) names Saudi Arabia in a security/geopolitical context. Checked Al Jazeera and Middle East Eye framing of the same event; Al Jazeera (Qatari state-funded) in-window coverage platforms the Houthi characterisation of Saudi actions as an 'unjust and oppressive siege' and references Saudi airstrikes on Sanaa airport, casting the Kingdom as a party to the conflict. Captured as one Negative Articles item.
notes: Themed negative searches and all 9 watchdog/NGO searches returned no in-window (2026-07-21/22) reputational items outside the security cluster; every negative item found (Amnesty Filipino domestic workers 9 Jul, CPJ 10 Jul, tourism-risk 15 Jul/Mar, RSF Index Apr) was out of window. The one in-window negative item comes from the adversarial-framing check on the day's lead security story.
